blended.narrative: Mont Sutton is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 3,845 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total.

Sunday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
